# brevo_webhook (Data Source)

Look up a webhook in Brevo by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the webhook.

### Read-Only

- `batched` (Boolean) Whether batched webhooks are enabled.
- `description` (String) Description of the webhook.
- `events` (List of String) Events triggering the webhook.
- `type` (String) Type of the webhook.
- `url` (String) URL of the webhook.
